headline: Microsoft signs landmark $50B multi-year Azure AI deal with leading enterprise customer; raises FY guidance
body: Microsoft Corp announced today a landmark multi-year cloud and AI infrastructure agreement worth approximately $50 billion in contracted revenue over the next four years with a leading global enterprise customer. The deal substantially de-risks Azure's near-term growth trajectory and extends visibility on AI workload monetization. Concurrently, the company raised full-year revenue and operating income guidance, citing strong commercial momentum across the Microsoft 365, Azure, and Dynamics platforms. Operating margin guidance was raised by 100 basis points. CEO Satya Nadella stated that the firm is now seeing accelerating AI adoption translate into durable contracted revenue. Shares rallied 4% in after-hours trading. Analyst commentary is broadly positive: the deal validates Microsoft's enterprise AI moat and the new guidance compounds the firm's earnings power for FY26 and beyond.
